overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European town at night. The scene features cobblestone streets, half-timbered houses, and torch-lit alleyways under an overcast stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town entrance with stone cathedral

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone street with swords on his back, passing the large stone building

entered.detail: large gothic stone structure with tall windows and wooden entrance canopy
burning torch in a metal bracket casting warm orange light
stacked wooden barrels near the building entrance
traditional medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
wooden vendor stall with canvas awning on the left side of street

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide cobblestone street at night, passing a large stone cathedral building on the right. The street is lined with wooden market stalls and illuminated by torchlight, with half-timbered houses visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with market stalls approaching stone archway

events.description: Geralt performs a dodge roll to the right, likely to avoid an obstacle or move faster

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow street then executing a combat roll at 32 seconds

entered.detail: simple wooden picket fence along the right side of the path
stone bridge or archway spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into an enclosed alley lined with wooden fences and stalls. Geralt continues walking toward a stone archway in the distance, then performs a sudden dodge roll to the right at 32 seconds before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage through archway into darker district

events.description: passing under the stone archway into a darker section of the town

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway and continuing into the darker back streets

entered.detail: shadowed area under the stone archway with reduced lighting
opening to a wider town square visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes under the stone archway into a darker, covered passage. The lighting drops significantly as he moves through the tunnel-like structure, emerging toward an open town square visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with NPC activity

events.description: encountering the first NPCs in the town square, including one holding a torch

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square following an NPC who is carrying a torch

notable_agents.action: townsperson walking ahead holding a lit torch, wearing simple medieval clothing

entered.detail: open cobblestone plaza surrounded by stone and timber buildings
wooden wagon or cart parked on the left side of the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a wide town square where the first NPCs are encountered, including a townsperson carrying a torch. He follows this NPC through the open plaza, passing wooden carts and illuminated stone buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from a wide, torch-lit street into a claustrophobic passage before opening into a bustling town square. It begins with Geralt walking along a broad cobblestone road past a massive stone cathedral and wooden market stalls. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into an enclosed alley lined with fences where Geralt performs a sudden dodge roll to the right before approaching a stone archway. The camera then follows him under the arch into a dark, covered passage where the lighting drops significantly, creating a tunnel-like effect. Finally, the environment expands as he emerges from the shadows into a wide open plaza, following a torch-bearing townsperson past wooden carts and illuminated stone buildings.
